summary: Iteration 33 testing completed. Frontend compiles successfully (previous transient error resolved). Code review verified all requested features: ReportView and BarristerView both have premium summary boxes with accused, sentence, crime/offence, grounds count, case strength, court/state. ReportView has Table of Contents with scroll-to-section. Reports tab inline display shows full in-browser content with Full Report Page and Barrister View buttons. Backend prompts include TABLE OF CONTENTS instruction in all 3 report types and explicitly exclude cost/witness sections via MANDATORY GUARDRAILS.
critical_code_review_comments: ReportView.jsx (lines 270-288): Premium summary box data-testid='report-top-summary-box' with 6 metrics: Accused, Sentence, Crime/Offence, Grounds of Merit, Case Strength, Court & State - all have proper data-testid attributes
ReportView.jsx (lines 290-312): Table of Contents section data-testid='report-table-of-contents' with scrollToSection() function to jump to sections
ReportView.jsx (line 341): Footer confirms 'This is a full in-browser report view — no PDF download required to read all sections'
BarristerView.jsx (lines 499-535): Premium summary box data-testid='barrister-top-summary-box' with 6 metrics matching ReportView
ReportsSection.jsx (lines 289-337): Inline expanded content shows full report text, plus 'Full Report Page' and 'Barrister View' buttons with proper data-testids
Backend server.py (lines 3118-3127): MANDATORY GUARDRAILS correctly exclude costs and witness credibility sections
Backend server.py: TABLE OF CONTENTS instruction present in quick_summary (line 3139), full_detailed (line 3195), extensive_log (line 3269)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 verified all requested features through code review and API testing. Key findings: 1) ReportView has premium summary box with 6 fields + TOC + full in-browser reading 2) BarristerView has matching premium summary box with 6 fields 3) ReportsSection inline display shows full content + Full Report/Barrister buttons 4) Backend prompts include TOC in all report types + exclude cost/witness sections via MANDATORY GUARDRAILS. Frontend compiled successfully after previous transient error. All 14 backend API tests pass.
